mapper.select: /* 공지 목록(로그인 상단 등) 최대 3건 — 고정 우선·최신순 notice.selectNoticeList */ SELECT NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TYPE_CD , TITLE , PIN_YN , PIN_DT , VIEW_CNT , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT , FEATURED_YN FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC LIMIT 3

/* 공지사항 상세 조회 notice.selectNoticeDetail */ SELECT NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TYPE_CD , TITLE , CONTENT , PIN_YN , PIN_DT , VIEW_CNT , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT , FEATURED_YN FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /* 공지사항 등록/수정 notice.upsertNotice */ INSERT INTO TB_NOTICE ( NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TYPE_CD , TITLE , CONTENT , PIN_YN , PIN_DT , VIEW_CNT , FEATURED_YN , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{noticeId} , #{noticeTypeCd} , #{title} , #{content} , IFNULL(#{pinYn}, 'N') , CASE WHEN IFNULL(#{pinYn}, 'N') = 'Y' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END , IFNULL(#{viewCnt}, 0) , IFNULL(#{featuredYn}, 'N') , IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y') , #{crtrId} , NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE NOTICE_TYPE_CD = VALUES(NOTICE_TYPE_CD) , TITLE = VALUES(TITLE) , CONTENT = VALUES(CONTENT) , PIN_YN = VALUES(PIN_YN) , PIN_DT = VALUES(PIN_DT) , FEATURED_YN = VALUES(FEATURED_YN) , USE_YN = VALUES(USE_YN) , MODIFY_DT = NOW()
